title: A Resolution Expressing Support and Interposing Non-objection to the Exploration Activities of Mase Power for the Mt. Puting Lupa Geothermal Field to Determine Its Feasibility for Power Generation Purposes in the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna. (AUTHOR: HON. MARLO PJ A. ALIPON,REE,RMP,MPA, 02/01/2021)
